cities.name: Rio de Janeiro
cities.description: A vibrant city known for its stunning beaches, lively carnival, and iconic landmarks like Christ the Redeemer.

cities.name: São Paulo
cities.description: Brazil's largest city, a bustling metropolis famous for its rich culture, cuisine, and nightlife.

cities.name: Sydney
cities.description: Home to the iconic Opera House and Harbour Bridge, Sydney is a world-class city with beautiful beaches.

cities.name: Melbourne
cities.description: Australia's cultural capital, known for its arts scene, coffee culture, and diverse neighbourhoods.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: The world's largest religious monument, a stunning 12th-century temple complex surrounded by a vast moat.

temples.name: Taj Mahal, India
temples.description: An ivory-white marble mausoleum and UNESCO World Heritage Site, one of the world's most iconic monuments.

beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: A stunning island surrounded by turquoise lagoons and coral reefs, known as the 'Pearl of the Pacific'.

beaches.name: Copacabana Beach, Brazil
beaches.description: One of the most famous urban beaches in the world, stretching 4km along Rio de Janeiro's coastline.
